title: Vere, Charlotte - Parliamentary Secretary at HM Treasury - ACOBA advice
body: "Baroness Vere left her role at HM Treasury in July 2024.  Advisory Board Member, Museum of the Prime Minister Baroness Vere sought the Committee’s advice about taking up a role with the Museum of the Prime Minister. The letter containing the Committee’s consideration and the conditions imposed on the appointment was sent in June 2025 and the appointment was taken up later that month. An accessible version of the letter is available here.  Vice President – International Relations, CORE POWER (UK) Limited Baroness Vere sought the Committee’s advice about taking up a role with CORE POWER (UK) Limited. The letter containing the Committee’s consideration and the conditions imposed on the appointment was sent in April 2025; and the appointment was taken up in May 2025. An accessible version of the letter is available here.  Non Executive Director, European Cargo Limited Baroness Vere sought the Committee’s advice about taking up a role with European Cargo Limited. The letter containing the Committee’s consideration and the conditions imposed on the appointment was sent in January 2025; and the appointment was taken up in February 2025. An accessible version of the letter is available here.  Member of the Advisory Board, Altitude Angel Baroness Vere sought the Committee’s advice about taking up a role with Altitude Angel. The letter containing the Committee’s consideration and the conditions imposed on the appointment was sent in October 2024; and the appointment was taken up in February 2025. An accessible version of the letter is available here. "
